Class RangeTower

java.lang.Object
tower.Tower
tower.RangeTower
All Implemented Interfaces:
Mergeable
public class RangeTower extends Tower implements Mergeable
A specialized Tower characterized by its superior engagement distance and versatile targeting. * The RangeTower boasts the highest base range among basic towers, allowing it to cover large portions of the map. Unlike standard ground towers, its refined findTarget(java.util.List<enemy.Enemy>) logic allows it to engage any living enemy within its radius. It also serves as a critical component in the fusion system to create high-range advanced structures.

    Description
    RangeTower(double x, double y)
    Constructs a RangeTower with high-distance combat statistics: - Range: 250 units (Long-range) - Cooldown: 1.0 second - Damage: 10 - Bullet Speed: 250 units/sec (Fast projectiles)

  • Constructor Details

    • RangeTower

      public RangeTower(double x, double y)
      Constructs a RangeTower with high-distance combat statistics: - Range: 250 units (Long-range) - Cooldown: 1.0 second - Damage: 10 - Bullet Speed: 250 units/sec (Fast projectiles)
      Parameters:
      x - Horizontal position on the game map.
      y - Vertical position on the game map.

  • Method Details

    • shoot

      protected void shoot(Enemy target, List<Bullet> bullets)
      Fires a standard Bullet toward the identified target. * The bullet speed is enhanced compared to basic towers to ensure it reaches distant targets effectively.
      Specified by:
      shoot in class Tower
      Parameters:
      target - The optimal enemy identified by the targeting logic.
      bullets - The global list of active projectiles.

    • findTarget

      protected List<Enemy> findTarget(List<Enemy> enemies)
      Overrides the targeting logic to remove type restrictions. * Unlike the base Tower class, RangeTower can target all enemies (including flying ones) that are alive and within range. It maintains the "First" targeting priority, focusing on the enemy furthest along the path.
      Overrides:
      findTarget in class Tower
      Parameters:
      enemies - List of all potential targets in the game.
      Returns:
      A list containing the single most progressed enemy within range.

    • getFusionResult

      public Tower getFusionResult(Tower other)
      Defines the fusion outcomes when a RangeTower is combined with elemental components. * Key recipes include: 1. Range + Zap = TeslaTower (Long-range chain lightning) 2. Range + Gas = TornadoTower (High-velocity AoE) 3. Range + Ice = GlacierTower (Extended slow-zone control)
      Specified by:
      getFusionResult in interface Mergeable
      Parameters:
      other - The secondary tower involved in the fusion.
      Returns:
      A new advanced Tower instance, or null if the combination is invalid.
